pages.title: When It Starts
pages.text: $(li)The main enhancement expires or is cleared early.$(br)$(li)Its matching Neural Overload begins one tick later.$(br)$(li)Duration ranges from 8 to 22 seconds by effect level.$(br)$(li)Each serum source has different penalties and its own warning icon.

pages.title: How to Recover
pages.text: $(li)Milk clears the beneficial serum effect.$(br)$(li)Milk still triggers the matching overload.$(br)$(li)Overload itself cannot be cured by milk.$(br)$(li)An equipped $(item)Life Support Pack$() makes overload expire at roughly 3x speed by default.$(br2)The pack does not prevent overload; it only shortens an active overload.
